data.title: Robert F. Kennedy's Confirmation: Cannabis Advocates Question His New Vow To 'Follow The Science' On Marijuana's Harms
data.description: Kennedy once said marijuana was a way to help "solve America's drug addiction problem." Now he's "follow the science" on the harms.
